title: RGE AI Handoff Packet Sidecar
description: Machine-readable .meta.json sidecar for a canonical ai_handoffs/<DISPATCH_ID>_<PACKET_TYPE>_<TIMESTAMP>.md packet. The Markdown packet is authoritative prose; this sidecar mirrors its header fields and machine-readable completion footer so watchers, CI hooks, and AI agents can parse dispatch state without scraping Markdown. The sidecar is optional. Defined by dispatch POSTV0-HANDOFF-SIDECAR-RECONCILE-001; see ai_handoffs/AI_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md.

schema_version.description: Schema identifier. Fixed for this version.

dispatch_id.description: Stable dispatch identifier; identical across every packet in the dispatch.

packet_type.description: Which lifecycle packet this sidecar mirrors.

author.description: Role + AI identity, e.g. 'Planner / OpenAI Codex', 'Executor / Claude', 'Reviewer / Codex'.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 local form, matching the packet filename timestamp slug.

status.description: Packet STATUS line. TASK: OPEN. EXEC: AWAITING_REVIEW|BLOCKED|NEEDS_HUMAN. REVIEW: APPROVED|NEEDS_CORRECTION|REJECTED. CORRECT: CORRECTION_OPEN. CLOSEOUT: CLOSED|ABANDONED.

exit_code.description: Mirrors the EXIT_CODE completion-footer line. 0 for success; non-zero for failure.

source_packet.description: Optional. Filename of the packet this one responds to (e.g. the TASK an EXEC acts on).

verification.description: Optional. Verification-gate commands run and their observed results.

deviations.description: Optional. Mirrors the EXECUTION_REPORT 'Deviations from Task Packet' section.

open_questions.description: Optional. Mirrors the EXECUTION_REPORT 'Open Questions for Reviewer' section.

approved_corrections.description: Optional. Mirrors the CORRECTION_PACKET approved-corrections list.

deferred_findings.description: Optional. Mirrors the CORRECTION_PACKET deferred-findings list.

final_commits.description: Optional. Mirrors the FINAL_CLOSEOUT commit list.

test_count_delta.description: Optional. Mirrors the FINAL_CLOSEOUT test-count delta.

remaining_risks.description: Optional. Mirrors the FINAL_CLOSEOUT remaining-risks (required non-empty there per protocol Rule 5).

suggested_follow_on.description: Optional. Mirrors the FINAL_CLOSEOUT suggested follow-on tasks.
